cases.prompt: 우리 스타트업 exit 전략 세워줘. IPO 로드맵이랑 상장 준비 어떻게 해야 해?

assertions.text: Produces an exit strategy selection across IPO/M&A/SPAC/Secondary
Lays out a stage-by-stage roadmap from Seed to Series A/B/C to Exit with key metrics per stage
Includes case studies such as Coupang's NASDAQ listing and Korean startup exits

cases.prompt: Help me plan an acquisition strategy and Series A preparation.

assertions.text: Identifies the key metrics required at each funding stage
Compares acquisition against other exit paths (IPO/SPAC/Secondary)
